description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark, gabled roof and a combination of black and white exterior walls. The front facade features a covered entryway supported by wooden columns, a wooden front door, and a small porch area with a tiled surface. Large rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically across the structure, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes visible exterior utility units and a mix of materials, such as wood accents and concrete elements. The roof has a prominent overhang, adding to the contemporary aesthetic and providing shade to the entryway. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gabled roof, asymmetrical windows, and a covered entryway with wood and concrete accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, wooden columns, and a mix of black and white exterior walls.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof overhang, multiple windows, and visible utility units at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view with fewer windows, two visible utility units, and a simple, clean facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a side door, and the continuation of the roof overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with wooden columns, tiled porch, and a wooden front door under a roof overhang.
